title: Advanced discs
description: Disc Replacements With Music From Mario, Pokémon, Anime And Sans
body:
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-All%20Rights%20Reserved-darkred?style=for-the-badge)
![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.x-green?style=for-the-badge)

Hi! i always thought minecraft disc where a little.... boring. so thats why i added replaced some music discs! feel free to remove any u dont like :) il hoping to bring more later

**Cat = Sonic Mania OST - Studiopolis Act 1**

**Creator = Kanshou Resistance**

**Relic = Pokemon Theme Song (Gotta catch 'em all)**

**Stal = An Enigmatic Encounter V2 - Undertale Last Breath (Phase 3)**

**Strad = Super mario galaxy title theme.**

**13 = Squid Game Wake Up Music**

**Exclusive to 1.21.7+ = The new lava chicken has been replaced with the original one from the movie!**

**Mellohi = bagel. bagel. bagel.**

**Blocks = Super Mario Oddesey Metro Kindom**

**Tears = Fall From The Sky PT.2**

**Chirp = Mice On Venus (Nostalgia)**

Looking for the bedrock version? > [Download Here](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/yq75dtsa8odfva1o0zsq2/Bedrock.mcpack?rlkey=bhxgbn2xqotmtx29ri76i61il&st=t38ansq6&dl=0) (expect later updates)


Made with ❤️
